name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's complete AI PM operating system. 80 skills (1 orchestrator + 62 AIPM skills across 7 layers + 17 general-purpose) and 10 slash commands. Designed to be installed on any Claude Code account as the durable home of RTP's expertise. Works alongside companion plugins (superpowers, compound-engineering, pm-skills, anthropic-skills) — see COMPANION-PLUGINS.md for the full ecosystem map.

plugins.name: rtp-personal-skills
plugins.description: The complete RTP skill library: rtp-aipm-orchestrator + 62 AIPM skills (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-and-trust, agent-design, eval-and-quality, craft) + 17 general-purpose skills (thinking, writing, branding, presentations, visualization, design-systems, research, admin, resume-builder, readme-storytelling). Plus 10 slash commands. Pairs with companion plugins documented in COMPANION-PLUGINS.md.
